name: hasthaveedhi-root
description: Unified HasthaVeedhi project for production deployment

scripts.install-all: npm run install-backend && npm run install-frontend
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm run install-all && npm run build-frontend
scripts.start: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && nodemon index.js" "cd frontend && npm start"
